name: admission deadline
text: We are pleased to offer you admission. Accept the place by 15 August 2026 and pay the semester fee through the university portal.

name: visa appointment
text: Your German embassy visa appointment is on 2026-09-01. Bring proof of health insurance and your blocked account confirmation.

name: payment request
text: Your invoice is ready. Transfer the application fee of 75 EUR before 31 July 2026 and keep the payment receipt.

name: general acknowledgement
text: Thank you for contacting our office. We received your message and will send a detailed response after our internal review.
